title: Pan-Seared Fish with Mediterranean Pilaf
description: A classic French dish combining the flavors of the Mediterranean with the simplicity of pan-seared fish. This recipe serves 4 and can be prepared in about 30 minutes.

ingredients.name: mediterranean pilaf
ingredients.notes: available in most supermarkets or homemade

instructions: Season the fish fillets with salt and pepper.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and sauté for 1 minute.
Add the fish fillets and cook for 3-4 minutes on each side, or until cooked through.
While the fish is cooking, heat the Mediterranean pilaf according to package instructions.
Squeeze the lemon juice over the fish and sprinkle with parsley.
Serve the pan-seared fish on top of the Mediterranean pilaf.
Garnish with additional parsley if desired.
